    queue = [start]

    while queue:
        # Remove the first vertex from the queue
        curr = queue.pop(0)

        # Check if we have reached the end vertex
        if curr == end:
            break

        # Check all neighbors of the current vertex
        for neighbor in graph[curr]:
            alt = dist[curr] + graph[curr][neighbor]

            # If the alternative route through the neighbor is better, update the distance
            if alt < dist[neighbor]:
                dist[neighbor] = alt
                queue.append(neighbor)

    return dist[end]
